name: openmm-lj13-cluster-refined-v1
description: A refined OpenMM Lennard-Jones LJ13 benchmark that starts near the canonical icosahedral packing and applies deterministic local energy minimization before scoring the gap to the accepted minimum.
paper_hypothesis: With compact icosahedral initialization and local minimization, the Autolab loop should repeatedly recover the LJ13 minimum to near floating-point precision, isolating optimizer reliability from obviously non-physical starting geometries.

evaluation.reference_note: Accepted reduced-unit LJ13 global minimum energy, approached here from compact icosahedral perturbations with local minimization enabled.
